rationale: The citing paper references Duan and Mela (2009) mainly in the literature review and Table 1 as an example of prior spatial work that uses numerical analysis for outlet location/pricing. The citation is used to position a broad gap (analytical optimal allocation in dynamic spatial settings) rather than to build the paper's model, estimation approach, or empirical design directly on that study. There is no clear method borrowing, hypothesis derivation, or direct empirical dependence on this specific cited paper.
